planner_output.reasoning_trace: The user is asking about weather, which is completely unrelated to personal audio products (headphones, earbuds, etc.). This is off-topic.

final_response: Ah, the weather! A topic as fascinating as built-in laptop speakers. But alas, my expertise is reserved for the glorious realm of headphones, earbuds, and all things audio!
